TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Justin_Anderson, title = Justin_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Justin_Anderson} }

S.FORM: Justin Anderson hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Justin Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players)

Justin Anderson hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Justin Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players)
S.PHON: *us~ɕtin an*ers~ɕon ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw / praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *us~ɕtin an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ)
